bookoffamiliars.configuration.maxFamilia: Maximum number of familiars a player can store. WARNING: Higher values may cause performance issues, especially on servers.
bookoffamiliars.configuration.entityBlac: List of entity types that cannot be stored. Format: ["minecraft:wolf", "minecraft:cat"]
bookoffamiliars.configuration.entityWhit: List of additional entity types that can be stored beyond the default tamed entities. Format: ["minecraft:cow", "minecraft:sheep"]
bookoffamiliars.configuation.resurrectio: Cooldown in minutes before a released familiar returns to the book after death
bookoffamiliars.configuration.resurrecti: Experience levels required to skip the resurrection cooldown.
bookoffamiliars.configuration.removeInva: Automatically remove familiars from the book if their mod is no longer installed.
bookoffamiliars.not_your_familiar: This entity is not your familiar!
bookoffamiliars.no_room: There's not enough space to release your familiar here!
bookoffamiliars.not_enough_xp: You need %d experience levels to revive this familiar.
bookoffamiliars.delete_confirm_line2: This will permanently delete %s from the world.
bookoffamiliars.familiar_recovering_full: %s has died but your book is full. They will be added when space is available.
bookoffamiliars.familiar_removed_missing: %s was removed from your book because their mod is no longer installed.
bookoffamiliars.familiar_pending_moved: %s is now recovering in your book.
